requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC — IEC 61000 Requirements for Zambia EV Charging
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与EMC——赞比亚电动汽车充电IEC 61000要求
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與EMC——尚比亞電動汽車充電IEC 61000要求

summary.en: For networked EV chargers deployed in Zambia, back-office communication using OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is the internationally standard protocol consistent with Zambia's IEC-aligned direction under ZABS. While Zambia does not yet have a single national EV network operator comparable to Qatar's Kahramaa Tarsheed system, any charge-point operator, fleet manager, or project developer deploying networked chargers in Zambia should implement OCPP back-office communication for remote monitoring, access control, session management, and fault reporting — as this is the interoperable standard accepted across IEC-aligned markets. EMC requirements under IEC 61000 series apply to EV chargers as electrical equipment imported under ZABS conformity assessment. Conducted and radiated emission limits, immunity requirements, and harmonic injection limits (IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12 for current harmonics) apply. ZESCO may also impose power-quality conditions as part of grid-connection approval for higher-power DC chargers.
summary.zh: 在赞比亚部署的联网电动汽车充电桩，后台通信采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）是与赞比亚ZABS IEC标准方向一致的国际通用协议。尽管赞比亚目前尚无类似卡塔尔卡赫拉马Tarsheed系统的单一国家电动汽车网络运营商，任何在赞比亚部署联网充电桩的充电点运营商、车队管理方或项目开发者，均应实施OCPP后台通信，用于远程监控、访问控制、会话管理和故障报告——因为这是IEC对齐市场普遍接受的互操作标准。电磁兼容要求依据IEC 61000系列适用于ZABS合格评定进口的电气设备。传导和辐射发射限值、抗扰度要求以及谐波注入限值（大电流谐波适用IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12）均须满足。ZESCO在较大功率直流充电桩的并网批准中也可能提出电能质量条件。
summary.zht: 在尚比亞部署的聯網電動汽車充電樁，後台通訊採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）是與尚比亞ZABS IEC標準方向一致的國際通用協議。儘管尚比亞目前尚無類似卡塔爾卡赫拉馬Tarsheed系統的單一國家電動汽車網絡運營商，任何在尚比亞部署聯網充電樁的充電點運營商、車隊管理方或項目開發者，均應實施OCPP後台通訊，用於遠程監控、訪問控制、會話管理和故障報告——因為這是IEC對齊市場普遍接受的互操作標準。電磁兼容要求依據IEC 61000系列適用於ZABS合格評定進口的電氣設備。傳導和輻射發射限值、抗擾度要求以及諧波注入限值（大電流諧波適用IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12）均須滿足。ZESCO在較大功率直流充電樁的併網批准中也可能提出電能質量條件。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment input current up to and including 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-12 — Limits for harmonic currents produced by equipment connected to public low-voltage systems with input current greater than 16 A
IEC 61000-4 series — Immunity requirements for electrical and electronic equipment
ZABS import conformity assessment — EMC evidence required for regulated electrical products (zabs.org.zm)
ZESCO power-quality conditions for grid-connection approval (zesco.co.zm)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system — a CAN bus protocol not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack. China AC chargers may support OCPP back-office depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 systems. For EMC, China applies GB/T standards in the GB/T 17625 / GB/T 17799 series, which partially align with IEC 61000 but are not the same editions and do not automatically satisfy ZABS IEC 61000-based EMC conformity requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能支持OCPP后台，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系统所要求的PP/CP信号。EMC方面，中国采用GB/T 17625 / GB/T 17799系列GB/T标准，部分对应IEC 61000，但版本不同，不能自动满足ZABS基于IEC 61000的EMC合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能支持OCPP後台，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系統所要求的PP/CP信號。EMC方面，中國採用GB/T 17625 / GB/T 17799系列GB/T標準，部分對應IEC 61000，但版本不同，不能自動滿足ZABS基於IEC 61000的EMC合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 17625 series — Limits for harmonic current emissions (China equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17799 series — EMC immunity standards (China equivalent to IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP at the version required by the intended charge-point operator or project specification for Zambia; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (3) IEC 61000 series EMC test reports (conducted emissions, radiated emissions, immunity, harmonic injection) from an ILAC-accredited laboratory are available for ZABS import conformity; (4) ZESCO power-quality conditions for the grid connection point are met, especially for DC fast chargers above 22 kW. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot integrate with OCPP-based back-office systems used by Zambia network operators.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持赞比亚目标充电点运营商或项目规范所要求的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告（传导发射、辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波注入）可供ZABS进口合格评定使用；(4) 满足ZESCO对并网点的电能质量条件，尤其是22 kW以上直流快充。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩无法与赞比亚网络运营商使用的基于OCPP的后台系统集成。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持尚比亞目標充電點運營商或項目規範所要求的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告（傳導發射、輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波注入）可供ZABS進口合格評定使用；(4) 滿足ZESCO對併網點的電能質量條件，尤其是22 kW以上直流快充。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁無法與尚比亞網絡運營商使用的基於OCPP的後台系統集成。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEC 61000 EMC conformity required under ZABS import CoC for regulated electrical products; OCPP is the de facto interoperability requirement for networked chargers in IEC-aligned markets including Zambia; GB/T 27930 is not compatible with IEC 61851-24 / CCS2 communication stack
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; GB/T EMC standards partially align with IEC 61000 but are not direct ZABS substitutes; OCPP support depends on the operator configuration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office capability and IEC 61000 EMC test evidence are both required for networked charger deployments in Zambia. GB/T 27930 DC communication must be replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2 DC chargers. GB/T EMC test reports do not automatically satisfy ZABS IEC 61000-based conformity requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 联网充电桩在赞比亚部署均需具备OCPP后台能力和IEC 61000系列EMC测试证据。CCS2直流充电桩必须将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118。GB/T EMC测试报告不能自动满足ZABS基于IEC 61000的合格评定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聯網充電樁在尚比亞部署均需具備OCPP後台能力和IEC 61000系列EMC測試證據。CCS2直流充電樁必須將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118。GB/T EMC測試報告不能自動滿足ZABS基於IEC 61000的合格評定要求。
